nasb.text: For before the harvest, as soon as the bud blossoms And the flower becomes a ripening grape, Then He will cut off the sprigs with pruning knives And remove and cut away the spreading branches.

esv.text: For before the harvest, when the blossom is over, and the flower becomes a ripening grape, he cuts off the shoots with pruning hooks, and the spreading branches he lops off and clears away.

cnv.text: 因為在收割以前，花蕾開盡， 花朵也成了將熟的葡萄之時， 他就用鐮刀削去嫩枝， 又砍掉蔓延的枝子。

ccb.text: 在收割之前， 在花已凋谢、葡萄将熟之时， 耶和华必毁灭古实人， 就像用刀削去葡萄树的嫩枝， 砍掉蔓延的枝条。

csbs.text: 收割之前，花已开尽、花正变为成熟的葡萄， 他就要用镰刀削掉嫩枝， 砍除蔓延的藤条，
